title: Vibration lens
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''vibration lens''' was a type of [[Focusing lens/Legends|focusing lens]] used in the construction or upgrading of [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]]. As its name suggested, the lens vibrated at a high rate of speed. This enabled the weapon to produce a more deadly, if less stable, beam.

==Behind the scenes==
In ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', these are the stats that are added or improved when this item is inserted into a lightsaber.
*Attack Penalty: -1
*Damage Bonus: Energy 2d6
*Defense Penalty: DB Deflection -1

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-12-21 -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords'': Prima Official Game Guide]]
